sections.heading: # **Discover Barbuda by Air**
sections.body:
**Experience Barbuda from Above — A Journey Like No Other** when you take a flight across the Caribbean Sea and discover Barbuda’s unspoiled beauty from a bird’s-eye view. In just 20 minutes, you’ll arrive on one of the most breathtaking islands in the Caribbean — home to pink-sand beaches, turquoise lagoons, and the world’s largest Frigate Bird Sanctuary.  
This signature tour is ideal for those who prefer a **comfortable, scenic, and time-efficient** way to explore Barbuda.

---

sections.heading: ### **Included in Your Tour**
sections.body:
* Round-trip flights between Antigua and Barbuda

* Pick-up and drop-off from Barbuda International Airport

* Fully guided sightseeing tour including:

  * **Frigate Bird Sanctuary and Pink Sand Beach** (water taxi ride included)

  * **Martello Tower**

  * **Two Foot Bay National Park**

  * **Princess Diana Beach** (leisure time)

* BBQ Chicken Lunch *(upgrade available)*

* Bottled water during the tour.

---

sections.heading: ### **Tour Duration**
sections.body:
Approximately **8** \- 9 **hours total**, including flights, guided sightseeing, lunch, and beach time.

---

sections.heading: ### **Price**
sections.body:
* **Adults:** US$349 per person

* **Children (2–12 years):** US$249 per person

* **Infants (under 2 years):** US$99 *(must sit on an adult’s lap during flight)*

**Lunch Upgrade Options:**	

* Fish, Conch, or Shrimp — *Add US$10*

* Lobster — *Add US$15*

sections.heading: **Flight Schedule**
sections.body:
* **Departure from Antigua:** 7:15 AM 

* **Arrival in Barbuda:** 7:35 AM

* **Return from Barbuda:** 4:30 PM

* **Arrival in Antigua:** 4:50 PM

*(Flight times may vary slightly depending on weather and operational conditions.)*

---

sections.heading: ### **Aircraft Used**
sections.body:
You’ll travel aboard one of the following aircraft:

* **J8-VBL Islander** 

* **J8-CRU Twin Otter** 

* **J8-VBK** 

* **Dash**\-**8**

* **ATR**\-**42** 

All aircraft are operated by one of our approved air partners, meeting the highest safety standards.

---

sections.heading: ### **What to Bring**
sections.body:
* **Valid passport or government-issued ID (same used when booking)**

* **Sunscreen, hat, and sunglasses**

* **Swimwear and towel**

* **Comfortable clothing and footwear**

* **Camera or smartphone for photos**

* **Light snacks or preferred beverages**

* **Reusable water bottle (water also provided)**

* **Umbrella (recommended)**

---

sections.heading: ### **Important Information**
sections.body:
* Please check in at **V.C. Bird International Airport** no later than **one hour and 15 minutes before your flight’s departure.** 

* Bring the **same ID or passport** used during booking — required for check-in.

* Flight availability is limited — book early to secure your seats.

* Weather conditions may affect tour timing. In the event of cancellation, guests will be fully refunded or rescheduled.

* Transportation to and from your hotel, towels and snorkeling gears are not included in the tour package.

* Guests will receive a **detailed tour itinerary & weather forecast 24 hours prior** to departure.

---

sections.heading: ### **Why Choose Discover Barbuda by Air?**
sections.body:
* **Fast & Scenic:** Get to Barbuda in just 20 minutes instead of a 90-minute ferry ride.

* **Comfort & Convenience:** Ideal for those prone to seasickness or short on time.

* **All-in-One Experience:** Includes sightseeing, beach relaxation, and authentic local cuisine.

* **Professional Guides:** Our local experts ensure an informative and memorable day.

* **Breathtaking Views:** Enjoy unmatched aerial views of Antigua, Barbuda, and the Caribbean Sea.

---

##

sections.heading: # **Discover Barbuda by Sea**
sections.body:
**Sail Across the Caribbean Sea to Discover** Barbuda aboard a scenic ferry from Antigua and spend the day exploring one of the Caribbean’s most untouched islands. From the world-famous **Pink Sand Beach** to the breathtaking **Frigate Bird Sanctuary**, this tour combines adventure, culture, and relaxation — a perfect way to experience Barbuda’s natural beauty at an affordable rate.

---

sections.heading: ### **Included in Your Tour**
sections.body:
* Round-trip ferry transportation between Antigua and Barbuda

* Pick-up and drop-off from Barbuda’s ferry dock

* Guided sightseeing tour including:

  * **Frigate Bird Sanctuary and Pink Sand Beach** (water taxi included)

  * **Martello Tower**

  * **Two Foot Bay National Park**

  * **Princess Diana Beach** (relaxation time)

* **BBQ Chicken Lunch** *(upgrade available)*

* Bottled water during the tour.

---

sections.heading: ### **Tour Duration**
sections.body:
Approximately **6-7 hours total**, including round-trip ferry and guided sightseeing.

---

sections.heading: ### **Price**
sections.body:
* **Adults:** US$249 per person

* **Children (2–12 years):** US$199 per person

* **Infants (under 2 years):** US$99 *(must sit on an adult’s lap)*

sections.heading: **Lunch Upgrade Options:**
sections.body:
* Fish, Conch, or Shrimp — *Add US$10*

* Lobster — *Add US$15*

sections.heading: **Ferry Schedule**
sections.body:
* **Departure from Antigua:** 6:30 AM (Heritage Quay Ferry Terminal)

* **Arrival in Barbuda:** 8:00 AM

* **Return from Barbuda:** 3:00 PM

* **Arrival back in Antigua:** 4:30 PM

*(90-minute crossing each way — schedule may vary based on weather and ferry operations.)*

---

sections.heading: ### **What to Bring**
sections.body:
* Passport or government-issued ID

* Hat, sunscreen, and sunglasses

* Swimwear and towel

* Comfortable shoes and light clothing

* Camera or smartphone

* Light snacks or preferred beverages

* Seasickness medication (recommended for sensitive travelers)

* **Reusable water bottle** (water also provided)

* **Umbrella** (recommended)

---

sections.heading: ### **Important Information**
sections.body:
* Check-in for the ferry at **Heritage Quay Ferry Pier** by **6:00 AM**.

* Weather conditions can affect sea travel; rescheduling or refunds will be offered if necessary.

* The ferry ride can be bumpy on rough days — this tour may not be ideal for those prone to motion sickness.

* Transportation to and from your hotel, towels and snorkeling gears are not included in the tour package.

* Guests will receive a **detailed tour itinerary & weather forecast 24 hours prior** to departure.

---

sections.heading: ### **Why Choose Discover Barbuda by Sea?**
sections.body:
* A scenic and budget-friendly way to explore Barbuda.

* Perfect for adventure seekers and nature lovers

* Full-day guided experience with authentic local hospitality

* Ideal for small groups and families

---

##

sections.heading: # **Barbuda Sky & Sea Adventure**
sections.body:
**The Ultimate Way to Experience Barbuda — Fly In, Cruise Back**.  This signature tour offers the best of both worlds — a **flight to Barbuda** in the morning and a **return ferry** in the afternoon.  Enjoy a smooth 20-minute scenic flight over the Caribbean Sea followed by an unforgettable day of exploration, sightseeing, and relaxation before sailing back to Antigua.

---

sections.heading: ### **Schedule**
sections.body:
* **Flight from Antigua:** 7:00 AM

* **Arrival in Barbuda:** 7:20 AM

* **Ferry departure from Barbuda:** 3:00 PM

* **Arrival in Antigua:** 4:30 PM

---

sections.heading: ### **Tour Duration**
sections.body:
Approximately **6-7 hours**, combining flight, guided tour, and ferry return.

---

sections.heading: ### **Included in Your Tour**
sections.body:
* One-way flight Antigua → Barbuda

* Return ferry Barbuda → Antigua

* Guided sightseeing tour with local expert

* Visits to:

  * **Frigate Bird Sanctuary**

  * **Pink Sand Beach**

  * **Martello Tower**

  * **Two Foot Bay National Park**

  * **Princess Diana Beach**

* **BBQ Chicken Lunch** *(upgrade available)*

* Bottled water during the tour

---

sections.heading: ### **Price**
sections.body:
* **Adults:** US$299 per person

* **Children (2–12 years):** US$229 per person

* **Infants (under 2 years):** US$99 *(on adult’s lap)*

sections.heading: **Lunch Upgrade Options:**
sections.body:
* Fish, Conch, or Shrimp — *Add US$10*

* Lobster — *Add US$15*

sections.heading: **What to Bring**
sections.body:
* Passport (required for flight check-in)

* Hat, sunscreen, and sunglasses

* Swimwear and towels

* Comfortable footwear

* Camera or phone

* Light snacks or preferred beverages

---

sections.heading: ### **Important Information**
sections.body:
* Check-in for flight at **V.C. Bird International Airport** no later than **one hour and 15 minutes before departure.** 

* Check-in for the ferry 30 minutes before departure. 

* Bring the same ID used during booking.

* Tour includes both air and sea travel; schedule may vary due to weather.

* The ferry ride can be bumpy on rough days — this tour may not be ideal for those prone to motion sickness.

* Transportation to and from your hotel, towels and snorkeling gears are not included in the tour package.

* Guests will receive a **detailed tour itinerary & weather forecast 24 hours prior** to departure.

---

sections.heading: ### **Why Choose the Barbuda Sky & Sea Adventure?**
sections.body:
* Enjoy both air and sea views of the Caribbean.

* Avoid the morning bumpy ferry ride while still experiencing the scenic return.

* Includes full-day tour and beach relaxation.

* A perfect balance of convenience and adventure

---

sections.heading: ### **A Relaxing Getaway to Paradise**
sections.body:
If your idea of paradise is sun, sea, and serenity — this is the tour for you. Fly or sail to Barbuda and spend the day on the island’s most famous beach, **Princess Diana Beach**, where turquoise waters and pink sands await.

---

sections.heading: ### **Travel Options**
sections.body:
Choose between:

* **Round-trip by Air** – Fast and comfortable (20-minute flight each way)

* **Round-trip by Sea** – Scenic ferry ride (90 minutes each way)

* **Round-trip by Helicopter –** Exclusive and luxurious way to get to the island in 15 minutes. 

* **Round-trip by Private Boat** – the best way for scenic with luxury to see paradise in 1-hour and 15 minutes.  


---

sections.heading: ### **Tour Duration**
sections.body:
Approx. **6–8 hours** depending on transport mode.

---

sections.heading: ### **Included in Your Tour**
sections.body:
* Round-trip transportation (flight, ferry, helicopter, or private boat)

* Taxi pick-up and drop-off from Barbuda airport/ferry dock to Princess Diana Beach

* Leisure time for swimming, sunbathing, and exploring.

* Lunch at beach Grill

* Optional lunch arrangements (additional cost):

  * **Nobu Barbuda**

  * **Uncle Roddy’s Beach Bar**

---

sections.heading: ### **Price**
sections.body:
* **Round-trip by Air:** From US$299 per person

* **Round-trip by Ferry:** From US$199 per person

* **Round-trip by Helicopter:** From US$699 per person (based on 6 people)

* **Round-trip by Private Boat:** From US$399 per person (based on 8 people)

---

sections.heading: ### **What to Bring**
sections.body:
* Passport (for air travel) or valid ID

* Hat, sunscreen, and sunglasses

* Swimwear, towel, and beachwear

* Comfortable sandals or flip-flops

* Camera or phone

* Small cash for lunch or souvenirs

---

sections.heading: ### **Important Information**
sections.body:
* Guests traveling by air must check in 1 hour and 15 minutes before departure.

* Lunch at Nobu Barbuda or Uncle Roddy’s are not included but can be arranged in advance.

* Bring your own beach towel, sun protection and snorkeling gear.

---

sections.heading: ### **Why Choose the Barbuda Beach Escape?**
sections.body:
* The ultimate relaxation experience.

* Perfect for couples and small groups

* Spend your day at the world-famous **Princess Diana Beach**

* Option to add luxury lunch or extend your beach time.

sections.heading: # **Already in Barbuda?**
sections.body:
If you’re already on the island, you can still experience Barbuda Leisure’s guided tours\!  
Join our local excursions that include sightseeing, beach relaxation, and cultural exploration \- available daily upon request. **REQUEST BOOKING**

---

sections.heading: ## **Shared Charter/Adventures**
sections.body:
Enjoy these exceptional shared experiences operated in partnership with trusted local providers.

**Excellence Barbuda by Sea**  
Operated by *our partners* — available **every Friday**. Experience a shared cruise from Antigua to Barbuda with onboard entertainment, snorkeling, and a beachside lunch.

sections.heading: **REQUEST BOOKING**
sections.body:
**Shared Barbuda Boat Charter**  
Operated by *our partners*. Cruise in comfort on a shared charter experience with complimentary beverages, snorkeling, and beach time in Barbuda.

sections.heading: ## **Private Charters**
sections.body:
For those seeking exclusivity and personalized service, our private charter experiences offer the ultimate in comfort and luxury.

**Barbuda Exclusive: Helicopter Adventure**  
Fly privately by helicopter and land directly on Princess Diana Beach for a full day of relaxation and a gourmet lunch. **REQUEST BOOKING**

**Barbuda Exclusive: Yacht Adventure**  
Sail aboard a private luxury yacht with your own captain and crew. Includes beach access, snorkeling, drinks, and a personalized itinerary. **REQUEST BOOKING**

**Barbuda Exclusive: Airplane Adventure**  
Travel privately by aircraft and explore Barbuda at your own pace with a custom island tour and optional dining experiences. **REQUEST BOOKING**

---

(Individual Tour Page)

sections.heading: # **Shared Barbuda Boat Charter**
sections.body:
Looking for a fun, social, and scenic way to experience Barbuda?  
Join our **Shared Barbuda Charter by our partners** — a small-group adventure that combines comfort, breathtaking views, and authentic island hospitality.  
Enjoy a full day exploring Barbuda’s pristine beaches, snorkeling in turquoise waters, and savoring a freshly grilled island-style lunch.

---

sections.heading: ### **Departure & Return Details**
sections.body:
* **Departure Points:**

  * Jolly Harbour – *9:00 AM*

  * Dickenson Bay – *9:30 AM*

* **Crossing Duration:** 1 hour 10 minutes to 1 hour 25 minutes (depending on sea conditions)

* **Return Time:** Between *5:00 PM and 5:30 PM*

---

sections.heading: ### **Experience Highlights**
sections.body:
Once you arrive in Barbuda, you’ll explore some of the island’s most beautiful and untouched locations, including:

* 🐚 **Spanish Point** – perfect for snorkeling and crystal-clear waters.

* 🌊 **Coco Point** – known for its long stretches of soft white and pink sand.

* 🏖️ **Princess Diana Beach** – Barbuda’s most famous beach, ideal for swimming and sunbathing.

* 🌅 Palmetto **Point** *(Time permitting)* – where the sand shimmers pink under the sunlight.

**Please note:** The exact itinerary and stops may vary depending on weather and sea conditions. Safety and guest comfort are always our top priority.

---

sections.heading: ### **What’s Included**
sections.body:
* **Round-trip boat transportation** between Antigua and Barbuda

* **Professional crew and guide** for the day

* **Cooler stocked with complimentary drinks:** water, sodas, beer, rum, rosé, and Prosecco

* **Towels and snorkeling gear provided**

* **Island-style lunch** freshly prepared by **a Local Beach Restaurant**

  * Choice of *Grilled Chicken* or *Grilled Lobster*

  * Side dishes may include rice & peas, macaroni salad, sweet potato salad, plantains, or local ground provisions — depending on the chef’s selection for the day.

---

sections.heading: ### **Lunch Upgrades**
sections.body:
Want to indulge a little more? You can add extra mains for a small fee:

* **Grilled Lobster** – \+US $25 per person

* **Grilled Chicken Wings** – \+US $20 per person

If you have any **dietary restrictions or food allergies**, please inform us when booking so we can make special arrangements with the chef.

---

sections.heading: ### **Important Information**
sections.body:
* **Group Size:** Minimum of 6 people required for the trip to operate (up to 10 guests maximum).

* **Weather Policy:** If sea conditions are unsafe, the trip will be rescheduled or moved to an alternate Antigua-based experience.

* **Motion Sickness:** The boats are fast and comfortable, but conditions can be choppy. If you are prone to seasickness, we recommend taking motion sickness medication prior to departure.

* **Cancellation Policy:** 50% fee applies unless canceled at least 48 hours in advance.

---

sections.heading: ### **Price & Booking**
sections.body:
* **Cost:** US$310 per person (Adults), US$220 (6-12 yrs. old), US$75 (3-5 yrs. old), Free (2 and under)

* **Deposit:** US$$20 deposit per person is required for booking.

* **Payment Methods:** Cash, Visa, MasterCard, or American Express accepted. Balance is payable on day of charter. 

* Once your deposit is received, we’ll confirm your spot and handle the coordination for the rest of the group.

---

sections.heading: # **Barbuda Exclusive: Helicopter Adventure**
sections.body:
Experience Barbuda like never before with our **luxury private helicopter adventure** — the most exclusive way to discover the island’s untouched beauty.

Whether you’re dreaming of a **romantic lunch escape**, a **sun-kissed beach picnic**, or an **extended day of exploration** among Barbuda’s pink-sand shores and natural wonders, we’ll design a **custom itinerary** just for you.

From the moment you lift off from Antigua, every detail is crafted for comfort, privacy, and unforgettable views of the Caribbean Sea below.

**Starting at just US $3,500**, this is more than a trip — it’s an experience made for those who believe paradise should be personalized.

📞 **Reserve your exclusive helicopter escape today\!**

sections.heading: ### **Set sail in style — discover Barbuda, your way.**
sections.body:
Embark on one of our most sought-after experiences — the **Barbuda Exclusive Yacht Adventure**, where luxury meets the open sea. Enjoy a **private charter across the Caribbean**, guided by our professional captain and crew, as you glide effortlessly from Antigua to Barbuda in just **1 hour and 15 minutes**.

Your unforgettable day can begin with a scenic departure from **Dickenson Bay** or **Jolly Harbour**, followed by an island-hopping escape to Barbuda’s most breathtaking coastal gems, including:

* **Spanish Point**  
* **Coco Point**  
* **Princess Diana Beach**  
* **Palmetto Point** *(Time permitting)*, where you may find shimmering pink sand.

Relax on deck with a **cooler of complimentary drinks** — including water, sodas, beer, rum, rosé, and Prosecco — and enjoy the sunshine, sea breeze, and unmatched Caribbean beauty.

All snorkeling gear and towels are provided, and you can choose to add a **seafood lunch, BBQ chicken meal, or guided island tour** for the ultimate indulgence.

Whether you’re celebrating a special occasion, enjoying a romantic escape, or simply craving adventure in luxury — this is the journey that defines paradise. **Starting at US$1800**

sections.heading: ### **Elevate your escape. Experience Barbuda from above.**
sections.body:
Take your island getaway to new heights with our **private aircraft charter from Antigua to Barbuda** — designed for those who seek **luxury, adventure, and exclusivity** in one unforgettable experience.

As you soar across the **turquoise Caribbean Sea**, enjoy breathtaking aerial views of Antigua’s coastline and Barbuda’s untouched pink-sand beaches below.  Every moment of your journey is tailored to perfection, offering comfort, style, and seamless service from takeoff to touchdown.

Your **Barbuda Exclusive Airplane Adventure** is fully customizable — whether you desire a **scenic flight**, a **private beach day**, or a **private day tour** exploring Barbuda’s natural wonders and cultural gems.  
Simply share your preferences, and our team will craft a **bespoke itinerary** designed precisely to your wishes.

**Starting at US $2,800 (round trip)**  
Experience the Caribbean’s most pristine paradise — your way.
